query:
SELECT person_id, distinct_id
                    FROM (
                        SELECT person_id, distinct_id,
                               ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY person_id ORDER BY id) as rn
                        FROM posthog_persondistinctid
                        WHERE team_id = $1 AND person_id = ANY($2)
                    ) sub
                    WHERE rn <= $3
